sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Arm Holdings Drops 6.75%: What Caused the Sharp Decline?
feed.summary: Arm Holdings (ARM) shares experienced a significant 6.75% decline, closing at $138.72, driven by increased market volatility and bearish options trading, particularly ahead of the April 10 expiration. Technical indicators also suggest weakness, with the stock nearing its crucial 200-day moving average support level. While the broader semiconductor sector shows mixed performance, ARM's drop highlights investor caution and potential for further downside, encouraging bearish strategies among traders.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Tuesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 industrials stocks that experienced significant movement during Tuesday's after-market session, highlighting both gainers and losers. Skillsoft Corp (SKIL) shares surged by 24.7% after its Q4 earnings were released, while Zenta Group Co (ZGM) shares also moved up significantly. Conversely, Addentax Group (ATXG) and ZTO Express (Cayman) (ZTO) shares saw declines.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corp. stock: Citigroup sees upside potential now
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Norfolk Southern Corp. (NYSE: NSC) stock to $313 from $300, indicating a 9% upside potential from recent trading levels. This update reflects the rail carrier's strong Q4 earnings, operational efficiency through Precision Scheduled Railroading, and diversified business model, despite facing cyclical headwinds and regulatory scrutiny. The consensus rating remains "Hold," but analysts see potential for steady growth and fair valuation for this key player in U.S. rail freight.

feed.title: Linde plc stock: Why industrial gases power your next portfolio move
feed.summary: Linde plc is positioned as a key player in industrial gases, essential for clean energy and technology sectors globally. The article highlights its stable growth across U.S., European, and international markets, backed by consistent dividend increases and a strong balance sheet. Investors are encouraged to consider Linde for its essential role in clean technology and its resilient business model.

feed.title: MSCI Inc. acquired PM Insights Inc.
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. announced the acquisition of PM Insights Inc. on April 7, 2026. This acquisition was completed on the same day, enhancing MSCI's offerings. The news was also reported by various financial news outlets throughout the day.

feed.title: Site Prep Started for New Clayton Tractor Supply
feed.summary: Site preparation has begun for a new Tractor Supply store in Clayton, New Jersey, a year after its approval. This location follows the opening of three other South Jersey Tractor Supply stores in Mantua, Pennsville, and Deptford. The new 21,960-square-foot store will be situated on Delsea Drive, targeting both homeowners and small farmers with a wide range of products.

feed.title: GARTNER CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) ...
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) on behalf of investors who purchased Gartner common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false and misleading statements and failed to disclose adverse facts about its business, operations, and prospects during this period. Investors have until May 18, 2026, to apply to be appointed lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Algoma Steel (ASTL) and Roshel launch Canadian ballistic defence steel venture
feed.summary: Algoma Steel Group Inc. and Roshel Inc. have formed a joint venture called Roshel Algoma Defence Solutions Inc. (RADS) to create Canada's Centre of Excellence for ballistic steel production. This partnership aims to provide sovereign, made-in-Canada ballistic steel for various defense applications, supporting Canadian defense programs and potentially creating over 500 jobs. The initiative aligns with Canada’s Defence Industrial Strategy and emphasizes a made-in-Canada approach to critical defense inputs.

feed.title: Realty Income Completes $800 Million 2033 Notes Offering
feed.summary: Realty Income Corporation successfully completed an $800 million offering of 4.750% notes due 2033, securing long-term debt capital and extending its debt maturity profile. This transaction, led by a syndicate of major financial institutions, underscores lender confidence and enhances the company's financial flexibility. An analyst rating indicates a Buy with a $70.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates O as Neutral due to a mix of solid cash generation, stable fundamentals, and tempered technical momentum.

feed.title: CEG Investors Have Opportunity to Join Constellation Energy Corporation Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced an investigation into Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: CEG) for potential securities law violations. This follows Constellation's March 31, 2026 earnings outlook, which revealed lower-than-expected guidance for 2026 and a failure to announce new power data center deals, leading to a nearly 6.5% drop in stock value. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks: Dow Inc. falls 85 points as caution prevails over ceasefire negotiations (April 7).
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) experienced a decline of 85 points, closing at $56.91 on April 7th, 2026. This dip reflects investor caution amidst ongoing ceasefire negotiations, suggesting market uncertainty surrounding these geopolitical developments. The stock traded within a range of $56.66 to $57.48 throughout the day.

feed.title: REX AI Equity Premium Income ETF (AIPI) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This Yahoo Finance page provides a detailed overview of the REX AI Equity Premium Income ETF (AIPI), including its current stock price, recent performance data, and key financial metrics. It highlights the ETF's investment strategy, which involves investing primarily in securities from the BITA AI Leaders Select Index, and notes its significant allocation to the technology sector. The page also offers comparative data with other related ETFs and shows a list of trending tickers in the market.

feed.title: Humana, CVS Climb After Medicare Finalizes 2.48% Rate Hike (1)
feed.summary: The US Medicare program will increase payments to private insurers by 2.48% in 2027, a significant improvement over earlier proposals. This final policy from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services is expected to add over $13 billion to Medicare Advantage plans next year. Following the announcement, shares of major insurance companies like UnitedHealth Group, Humana, and CVS Health Corp. saw considerable gains in premarket trading.

feed.title: Fortinet releases emergency hotfix for FortiClient EMS zero-day flaw
feed.summary: Fortinet has released an emergency hotfix for a critical zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-35616) in its FortiClient Endpoint Management Server (EMS), which attackers have been exploiting since late March. This flaw allows unauthenticated remote code execution and is rated 9.1 critical. Organizations using on-premises FortiClient EMS 7.4.5 and 7.4.6 are urged to apply the hotfix and check for compromises, as this is the second such vulnerability exploited this year.

feed.title: [Form 4] WATERS CORP /DE/ Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Waters Corp senior vice president Jianqing Bennett reported a routine tax-related disposition of 302 common shares at $304.09 per share to cover tax obligations on vested restricted stock units. Following this transaction, Bennett directly holds 6,532 shares of Waters common stock. The insider trading activity has a neutral impact and sentiment according to Rhea-AI.

feed.title: Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes from UBS AG (AMUB) linked to Freeport-McMoRan
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Freeport-McMoRan Inc. common stock, maturing around April 9, 2027. These notes provide contingent coupons if the underlying stock meets specific barriers on observation dates and may be redeemed early if the initial level is met. Investors face principal loss if the notes are not called and the final stock level falls below a downside threshold, and all payments are subject to UBS AG's creditworthiness.

feed.title: Human-rights disclosure push at PepsiCo (NYSE: PEP) ahead of May 6 AGM
feed.summary: A shareholder coalition, led by Friends Fiduciary Corporation, is pushing for Proposal 5 at PepsiCo's upcoming May 6, 2026 annual meeting. This proposal seeks disclosure on the effectiveness of PepsiCo’s human rights due diligence across its operations, franchisees, and value chain. Proponents argue that existing disclosures are insufficient for investors to assess the effectiveness of these systems, particularly in higher-risk supply chains and geographies, and emphasize the materiality of such information for long-term value creation and risk oversight.

feed.title: IAC adjusts MGM Resorts (NYSE: MGM) stake and signs new voting pact
feed.summary: IAC Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13D, reporting its beneficial ownership of approximately 65,822,350 shares of MGM Resorts International, which represents about 25.7% of outstanding shares. A new Voting Agreement has been signed with MGM and Barry Diller, stipulating that any voting securities held by IAC, Mr. Diller, and their affiliates exceeding 25.73% of MGM’s voting power must be voted proportionally with other MGM stockholders. The agreement outlines specific conditions for its termination, including a drop in collective stake, failure to nominate IAC-designated directors, or a change of control at MGM.

feed.title: Nantahala Capital reports 692,335 shares in Assertion Holdings (ASRT)
feed.summary: Nantahala Capital Management, LLC, along with its managers Wilmot B. Harkey and Daniel Mack, has reported shared beneficial ownership of 692,335 shares of Assertio Holdings, Inc. (ASRT) common stock as of March 31, 2026. This represents a 10.74% stake in the company, based on 6,445,161 shares outstanding. The disclosure, made via a Schedule 13G/A filing, indicates passive investment intent, with shared voting and dispositive powers over the reported shares.

feed.title: AEHR TEST SYSTEMS ($AEHR) Releases Q3 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: AEHR TEST SYSTEMS ($AEHR) reported Q3 2026 earnings, beating EPS estimates by $0.02 with -$0.05 per share, but missing revenue estimates with $10.31 million. The stock price declined by 4.8% since market close. Insider trading data shows 11 sales and no purchases in the last six months, while institutional investors have shown mixed activity with some adding and others reducing positions.

feed.title: CMS Energy to pair first-quarter results with 2026 outlook in webcast
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) announced it would release its 2026 first-quarter results and provide a business and financial outlook on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EDT. A live webcast will be available on the company's website, with an audio replay archived for 30 days. The announcement also details the company's past earnings call patterns and recent operational news.

feed.title: CMS Energy to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 28
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) announced it will provide its 2026 first-quarter results and a business and financial outlook on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EDT. A webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's website, cmsenergy.com, with an audio replay archived for 30 days in the "Investors" section. CMS Energy is a Michigan-based energy company with Consumers Energy as its primary business.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) director granted deferred stock units tied to Silver Lake
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions director Greg Mondre reported the acquisition of 63 deferred stock units of common stock, valued at $438.96 per unit, as director compensation. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 1,863.32 deferred stock units. Additionally, 21,965.99 deferred stock units are indirectly held for the benefit of Silver Lake entities, and any proceeds from the sale of these indirect holdings will be remitted to Silver Lake or its limited partners, with Mondre disclaiming beneficial ownership except for any pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems reports Q3 EPS (5c), consensus (7c)
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems reported Q3 EPS of (5c), outperforming the consensus estimate of (7c). The company's Q3 revenue was $10.31M, against a consensus of $10.85M, with strong bookings of $37.2M and a book-to-bill ratio over 3.5x. Aehr highlighted accelerating demand across its WLBI and PLBI segments due to increased semiconductor complexity and applications in AI, networking, automotive, and industrial sectors.

feed.title: Ball to Announce First Quarter Earnings on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. The company will host a quarterly conference call at 6:30 a.m. Mountain Time (8:30 a.m. Eastern Time) to discuss its results and performance. A webcast and replay will be available for those unable to attend the live call.

feed.title: Does Generac (GNRC) And CPower’s PJM Deal Quietly Reposition Its Commercial Energy Strategy?
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. and CPower Energy have partnered to deploy distributed generation solutions for commercial and industrial customers in PJM, including battery storage, generators, and microgrids. This collaboration aims to leverage Generac's equipment and CPower's demand response expertise to address rising electricity demand and high power prices. The deal reinforces Generac's strategy to expand its commercial and industrial energy solutions, moving beyond weather-driven residential demand while executing on data center generator opportunities and navigating risks from its clean energy segment.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (GPN) stock experienced a 3.60% decline on Tuesday, closing at $62.70, underperforming key market indices like the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average. The company's stock is now 31.07% below its 52-week high of $90.96.

feed.title: Sysco (NYSE: SYY) to Buy Jetro for $29B — CEO Hourican Details Deal
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation plans to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot for $29 billion, a move CEO Kevin Hourican believes will expand Sysco's cash-and-carry footprint, increase revenue by 20%, and free cash flow by 55%. The deal aims to leverage Jetro's low-cost model and broad assortment, especially for smaller restaurants, while also enhancing Sysco's delivery services and purchasing power. Despite an initial negative market reaction, Hourican emphasizes the strategic fit and resilience of Jetro's business model, particularly its consistent sales and profit growth.

feed.title: Q1 2026 revenue jumps at Hyperscale Data (NYSE: GPUS) on Gresham and Ault Lending
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data (GPUS) announced preliminary unaudited Q1 2026 consolidated revenue between $43 million and $45 million, marking a substantial 72% to 80% increase year-over-year. This growth is primarily attributed to contributions from its subsidiaries, Gresham Worldwide, post-bankruptcy, and high-margin revenue from Ault Lending. The company also reiterated its strategic pivot towards AI data centers and digital assets, with a planned divestiture of Ault Capital Group in Q2 2027.

feed.title: PNC completes $119.3B community benefits plan, breezes past original goal
feed.summary: PNC has concluded its $119.3 billion community investment plan, surpassing original expectations. The plan, initiated after a significant acquisition, focused on distributing funds across housing, small business, and charitable initiatives nationwide. The bank's efforts demonstrate a strong commitment to community development.

feed.title: Adtran Holdings, Inc. / US00486H1059
feed.summary: This article reports on a major holdings notification by Adtran Holdings, Inc. to comply with the German Securities Trading Act. The notification details that The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. has acquired/disposed of shares with voting rights, resulting in a total voting rights percentage of 10.85% as of April 1, 2026. The report includes a breakdown of direct and indirect voting rights, as well as those held through various financial instruments.

feed.title: Deep Track files Schedule 13G reporting 7.36M shares in ALMS (ALMS)
feed.summary: Deep Track Capital, Deep Track Biotechnology Master Fund, and David Kroin have jointly filed a Schedule 13G, reporting beneficial ownership of 7,362,035 shares of ALUMIS Inc. (ALMS). This represents 5.98% of the company's common stock as of April 7, 2026. The filing indicates shared voting and dispositive power over these shares, based on 123,139,425 shares outstanding as of March 12, 2026.

feed.title: MAA (NYSE: MAA) EVP French Barton reports 8,508-share ownership in Form 3
feed.summary: MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES INC. EVP Investments, James Barton French, has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing direct ownership of 8,508 shares of the company's Common Stock. This filing establishes his beneficially owned shares as of April 1, 2026, and does not indicate any recent buy or sell transactions. The report serves as a baseline for his holdings within the company.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems reports $37.2M bookings in fiscal Q3
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ:AEHR) announced $37.2 million in bookings for its fiscal Q3 ended February 27, 2026, achieving a book-to-bill ratio over 3.5x. Despite a decline in net revenue and an increased GAAP net loss compared to the prior year, the company holds a backlog of $38.7 million and expects strong bookings for the second half of fiscal 2026. The company also recently secured significant orders from a new silicon photonics customer and a follow-on order from an existing one, reinforcing its position in the AI and data center markets.

feed.title: Intel joins Elon Musk’s Terafab chip manufacturing initiative
feed.summary: Intel Corp. announced its participation in Elon Musk's Terafab initiative, a collaboration between SpaceX and Tesla focused on building a semiconductor manufacturing hub for AI and robotics chips. Intel's involvement, which caused its shares to climb 4%, could include plant construction, maintenance, and providing its advanced chip packaging technologies. The Terafab campus in Texas aims to produce 1 TW/year of compute and will feature two fabs for edge processors and orbital AI data center chips.

feed.title: Renergen Limited Helium Project hits phase 1 milestone ahead of schedule, ASP Isotopes accelerates progress
feed.summary: ASP Isotopes Inc. has completed phase 1 drilling on the Renergen Limited Helium Project four months ahead of schedule. This early completion, coupled with gas flow rates 16 times higher than previous wells, marks a significant milestone for the project. The company plans to advance to subsequent phases of the Helium Project.

feed.title: AVANOS MEDICAL prepares for ASRA annual meeting with live ultrasound demo on April 17, 2026
feed.summary: AVANOS MEDICAL announced its participation in the American Society of Regional Anesthesia and Pain Medicine Annual Meeting in April 2026. The company will host a live ultrasound screening demonstration at booth 314 on April 17, 2026, to showcase its ONQ and Ambit product lines. This participation highlights AVANOS MEDICAL's continued commitment to advancements in pain medicine, following their recent release of the RxCrush Pill Crushing System.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at Alkami (NASDAQ: ALKT)
feed.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALKT) will hold its virtual annual shareholder meeting on May 19, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of three Class II directors, the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, and an advisory proposal on executive compensation. The company reported 2025 GAAP revenue of $443.6 million, a 32.9% year-over-year increase, and Adjusted EBITDA of $59.1 million, while also noting a GAAP net loss of $47.7 million. Executive compensation for 2025 emphasizes a pay-for-performance approach tied to annual financial results and long-term equity incentives, with annual bonus payouts averaging 125.3% of target.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Tractor Supply (TSCO) Earnings Miss Amid Expanded FFA Community Initiatives
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company recently reported a softer fourth quarter with revenue missing analyst expectations and weaker full-year earnings guidance. Despite this, the company continues to invest in community engagement, such as an FFA-exclusive contest, to strengthen its rural brand identity. Investors will likely weigh these near-term financial pressures against the company's long-term strategy of fostering customer loyalty and its "Life Out Here" community focus.

feed.title: Adeia to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
feed.summary: Adeia Inc. (Nasdaq: ADEA) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026. The company will host an earnings conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day. Details for accessing the call via dial-in and webcast have been provided for interested participants.

feed.title: Alnylam (NASDAQ: ALNY) HR chief auto-sells shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals' Chief Human Resources Officer, Melissa McLaughlin, reported the automatic sale of 3,910 shares of common stock on April 2 and April 6, 2026. These transactions were executed to cover minimum statutory tax withholding obligations on vested restricted stock units, as per a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan adopted on December 16, 2025. Following these sales, McLaughlin directly holds 9,443 shares of Alnylam common stock.

feed.title: Equifax will post March-quarter results before market open April 21
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 21, 2026. The company will issue a press release and post presentation materials at 6:30 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. An audio replay of the call will be available on their investor website starting April 22.

feed.title: 9.8M Artelo Biosciences (ARTL) shares registered for resale after March 2026 PIPE
feed.summary: Artelo Biosciences has filed an S-1 registration statement for the resale of up to 9.8 million shares of common stock by existing investors. These shares originate from a private placement in March 2026, including common stock and shares underlying pre-funded, common, and placement agent warrants. While Artelo will not receive proceeds from the stockholder resales, it could receive up to $21.5 million if the warrants are exercised for cash, which would be used for working capital and debt repayment.

feed.title: Alexander’s (NYSE: ALX) outlines 2026 vote on new omnibus stock plan
feed.summary: Alexander's (NYSE: ALX) is preparing for its virtual annual meeting on May 21, 2026, where stockholders will vote on several key proposals, including the election of three Class II directors and the adoption of a new 2026 Omnibus Stock Plan. This new plan seeks to authorize up to 500,000 shares for future equity awards, replacing the remaining pool of the 2016 plan. Given that Interstate Properties and Vornado Realty Trust collectively own approximately 58% of outstanding shares and intend to vote in favor of all proposals, their approval is highly anticipated.

feed.title: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc Stock (CRWD) Closed Up by 5.88% on Apr 7: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (CRWD) saw a 5.88% increase in its stock price on April 7, driven by several factors including an additional $500 million share repurchase authorization, a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts, and the unveiling of its Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem at RSA 2026. These developments, coupled with strong financial performance and overall growth in the cybersecurity sector, contributed to the positive market reaction despite some intraday volatility.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT to post Q1 results May 7, hold webcast May 8
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT (NYSE: AHR) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on May 7, 2026, after market close, followed by a public conference call and webcast on May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. The company will review its Q1 2026 results, discuss recent events, and conduct a Q&A session. Investors can access the webcast or join via telephone, with a digital replay and full earnings report available on the company's Investor Relations website shortly after the call.

feed.title: Hyperscale Data, Inc. Announces Preliminary Q1 2026 Revenue of $43 Million to $45 Million, Reflecting Approximately 72% to 80% Year-Over-Year Growth
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data, Inc. announced preliminary, unaudited consolidated revenue for Q1 2026, expecting to report between $43 million and $45 million, an increase of 72% to 80% year-over-year. This growth is primarily attributed to contributions from its Gresham Worldwide, Inc. subsidiary emerging from bankruptcy and strong performance from its Ault Lending, LLC business. The company highlighted increased high-margin revenue streams and its strategic focus on AI infrastructure capabilities, anticipating improved profitability.

feed.title: Hyperscale Data projects up to 80% growth as two units add $20M
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data (NYSE: GPUS) anticipates Q1 2026 revenue between $43 million and $45 million, representing 72% to 80% year-over-year growth. This surge is largely attributed to $10 million from Gresham following its bankruptcy emergence and another $10 million in high-margin revenue from Ault Lending. The company expects to release full financial results in May 2026, noting potential earnings volatility from Ault Lending's equity trading activities.

feed.title: Essex will post quarterly results April 28, with open webcast next day
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESS) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026, after market close. A conference call with senior management is scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time, accessible via internet or phone, with a replay available for 30 days online and 7 days digitally. Essex Property Trust is an S&P 500 REIT managing multifamily residential properties in West Coast markets.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Closed Up by 3.19% on Apr 7: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) stock saw a 3.19% increase, outperforming the Technology Equipment sector, driven by strong demand for data storage solutions from the AI and data center sectors. The company's HAMR technology and positive analyst sentiment are key contributors to its growth. Despite some intraday volatility due to a recent downgrade and insider selling, technical and fundamental analyses show positive indicators.
